product.name: MSI Rivello 12 in. x 24 in. Luxury Vinyl Flooring, Rigid Core Planks, LVT Tile, Waterproof LVT, Wood Grain Finish, 12 MIL Wear Layer, 5 mm Thick, 19.37 sq. ft./Case, Mountains Gray
product.description: Mountains Gray® Luxury Vinyl Tile offers the elegance of natural stone in an affordable, easy-care vinyl flooring. With its subtle clouds of gray and greige tones, this genuine stone look tile gives your project a sense of sophistication that's always on-trend. This LVT features a modern yet rugged concrete finish and is coated with PietraTech™—an MSI exclusive polish that emulates authentic marble. These 12x24 vinyl floor tiles are 100% waterproof and provides durability and longevity, protecting against everyday wear. An innovative 1MM pre-attached backing offers sound protection and comfort underfoot. This rigid core flooring features “no acclimation” technology that enables buy today, install today convenience. Add this rugged LVT flooring to the bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, hallway, living room and beyond.
features: FOR USE INDOORS: Ideal for home, office and in temperature-controlled environments only. Can be used in any room in your home such as kitchens, dining rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, foyers and basements
EASY TO INSTALL: Planks interlock on all 4 sides and can be installed over most existing surfaces including tile, wood, concrete and vinyl – DIY Floating floor home improvement made simple
EASY CLEAN & 100% WATERPROOF : Super easy to clean, tiles are 100% waterproof with an IXPE integrated sound reduction underlayment that does not absorb water
DURABLE: 5MM thick - 12MIL wear layer. Strong at the core, stylish at the surface with rigid core performance
PLANK SIZE: 11.81 in. W x 23.62 in. L x 0.2 in. T
